memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Owain Cyfeiliog (1130-1197)
memoryArtifacts.description: Owain ap Gruffydd (c. 1130–1197) was a prince of the southern part of Powys and a poet. He is usually known as Owain Cyfeiliog to distinguish him from other rulers named Owain, particularly his contem …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd於1128年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Maredudd35歲，母親Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu32歲。他於大約1160年與Gwenllian ferch Owain在威爾士凱爾納方史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1185年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾被列為monk of strata marcella。他去世於1197年在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯波斯維爾申普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd于1128年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Maredudd35岁，母亲Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu32岁。他于大约1160年与Gwenllian ferch Owain在威尔士凱爾納方史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1185年在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾被列为monk of strata marcella。他去世于1197年在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯波斯維爾申普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd was born in 1128, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Maredudd, was 35 and his mother, Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu, was 32. He married Gwenllian ferch Owain about 1160, in Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1185, his occupation is listed as monk of strata marcella in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales. He died in 1197, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Welshpool, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Strata Marcella Abbey, Welshpool, Powys,: Welshpool, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd est né en 1128, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Maredudd, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian ferch Owain environ 1160, à Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1185, sa profession de son indiquée est monk of strata marcella à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Il est décédé en 1197, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Welshpool, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd 1128 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Maredudd 35 und seine Mutter Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu 32. Er hat um 1160 in Caernarfonshire, Wales Gwenllian ferch Owain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1185 ist sein Beruf als monk of strata marcella in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales aufgeführt. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Welshpool, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd è nato il nel 1128 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Maredudd, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian ferch Owain circa 1160, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1185, la sua occupazione è indicata come monk of strata marcella nel Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Morì nel 1197, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Welshpool, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffuddが1128年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Mareduddは35歳，母Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneuは32歳であった。約1160年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでGwenllian ferch Owainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1185年，ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルでの職業はmonk of strata marcellaと記録されている。彼は1197年に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズポウイスウエルシュプオオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd(이)가 1128년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Maredudd(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1160년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Gwenllian ferch Owain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1185년, 그의 직업은 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에서 monk of strata marcella이었다. 그는 1197년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 파우이스 웰쉬포에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd nasceu em 1128, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Maredudd, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian ferch Owain aproximadamente 1160, em Caernarfonshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1185, sua profissão aparece como monk of strata marcella em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Ele faleceu em 1197, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Welshpool, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.Strata Marcella Abbey, Welshpool, Powys,: Welshpool, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd родился в 1128 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Maredudd было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian ferch Owain около 1160 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1185 году он работал по профессии monk of strata marcella в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс. Он умер в 1197 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности велшпул, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd nació en 1128, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Maredudd, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gwenllian ferch Owain aproximadamente 1160, en Caernarfonshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1185, su ocupación registrada era monk of strata marcella en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Murió en 1197, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Welshpool, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido.
